Embracing the Olympic spirit and the excitement of the Paris Olympics, the "Shanghai Summer" consumption festival is heating up the city's nightlife and giving a boost to the local economy. A trendy new night market along the Xuhui riverside promenade offers an enticing blend of food, culture, sports, and entertainment. With its sports-themed stalls and interactive activities, this festival aims to infuse Shanghai's summer with greater vibrancy.
